problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: Combining Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
